\section{Reproducibility Manifest}
\label{app:repro}

This appendix records a minimal reproduction recipe: exact commands, data locations, and a pinned repository state.
The manifest lists the minimal set of commands/outputs needed to reproduce the main claims; additional exploratory reports referenced in the text are not required unless explicitly listed here.
Run \path{PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/generate_repro_manifest.py} to refresh this manifest.

\paragraph{Repository state.}
Commit: \texttt{8862158} (full: \texttt{8862158f019578262f5e4b8222da30e8265df300}); branch: \texttt{main}; dirty: \texttt{false}.

\paragraph{Environment.}
Python: \texttt{3.12.8 | packaged by Anaconda, Inc. | (main, Dec 11 2024, 16:31:09) [GCC 11.2.0]}.
Platform: \texttt{Linux-6.6.87.2-microsoft-standard-WSL2-x86\_64-with-glibc2.39}.
Packages: \texttt{numpy}={1.26.4}, \texttt{scipy}={1.14.1}, \texttt{torch}={2.2.2+cpu}, \texttt{matplotlib}={3.10.0}.

\paragraph{Datasets.}
Paths below are the expected on-disk locations used by the scripts in this repository. Large outputs under \path{runs/} and \path{reports/} are not tracked.
\begin{itemize}[nosep]
  \item \textbf{Brain-* k-Wave pilots (simulated IQ)}: Labeled low-FPR ROC + ablations. (local: \path{runs/pilot/}; source: \path{(generated locally via sim/kwave/pilot_motion.py / Makefile targets r4c-*)}).
  \item \textbf{Mace/Urban whole-brain mouse fUS (PD-only)}: PD-only telemetry + hold-out alias-gate evaluation (no Doppler IQ). (local: \path{data/whole-brain-fUS}; source: \path{https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.4905862}).
  \item \textbf{Shin RatBrain Fig3 (LOCA-ULM) beamformed IQ}: Real-IQ ingestion/telemetry/contract + label-free robustness sweeps. (local: \path{data/shin_zenodo_10711806/RatBrain_Fig3.zip (extracts to data/shin_zenodo_10711806/ratbrain_fig3_raw)}; source: \path{https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.10711806}).
\end{itemize}

\paragraph{Pre-registered selections used in this manuscript.}
\begin{itemize}[nosep]
  \item \textbf{Brain seed sweep (AliasContract pilot)}: seed2-seed12 (n=11).
  \item \textbf{Shin all-clips telemetry}: IQData001-IQData080 (n=80), window 0:128.
  \item \textbf{Shin motion subset}: IQData001-005, IQData010, IQData020, IQData040, IQData060, IQData080 (n=10).
  \item \textbf{Mace holdout split (deduplicated)}: train: scan1/2 + scan3/6; test: scan4 + scan5.
\end{itemize}

\paragraph{Artifact commands.}
Each entry below lists the command(s) used to regenerate the referenced paper artifact(s). Most scripts write a JSON summary containing the full parameterization and are safe to rerun.
\begin{enumerate}[label=(R\arabic*),nosep]
  \item \textbf{PD-mode sanity checks (PD-mode map and score S=-PD)}
    (paper refs: Notation (PD convention)).
    Outputs: \path{reports/pd_mode_sanity/ (optional figs)}.
    Notes: Run on any generated acceptance bundle root containing pw\_* directories.
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/pd_mode_sanity.py runs/<bundle_root>/pw_* --out-dir reports/pd_mode_sanity
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{Conditional STAP leakage ablation (full vs conditional masks)}
    (paper refs: Results (Brain-k-Wave): conditional STAP ablation).
    Outputs: \path{reports/condstap_leakage.csv}, \path{reports/condstap_leakage.json}.
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/conditional_stap_leakage_ablation.py \
  --pilots runs/pilot/r4_kwave_seed1 runs/pilot/r4_kwave_seed2 \
  --profile Brain-OpenSkull \
  --out-root runs/ablation/condstap_leakage \
  --window-length 64 --window-offset 0 --disjoint-offset 64 \
  --summary-csv reports/condstap_leakage.csv \
  --summary-json reports/condstap_leakage.json
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{Brain-* baseline fairness: MC--SVD(e) tune-once sweep}
    (paper refs: Baseline fairness (Brain-*)).
    Outputs: \path{reports/brain_mcsvd_energy_sweep.csv}, \path{reports/brain_mcsvd_energy_sweep.json}.
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/brain_mcsvd_energy_sweep.py \
  --pilot runs/pilot/r4_kwave_seed1 \
  --profile Brain-OpenSkull \
  --out-root runs/sweep/mcsvd_energy_brain_seed1 \
  --window-length 64 --window-offset 0 \
  --energy-fracs 0.90,0.95,0.97,0.975,0.98,0.99 \
  --fprs 1e-4,3e-4,1e-3 \
  --summary-csv reports/brain_mcsvd_energy_sweep.csv \
  --summary-json reports/brain_mcsvd_energy_sweep.json
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{KA Contract v2 falsifiability ablation (STAP-only vs contract vs forced)}
    (paper refs: KA evaluation discipline).
    Outputs: \path{reports/ka_v2_ablation.csv}, \path{reports/ka_v2_ablation.json}.
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/ka_contract_v2_ablation.py \
  --pilot runs/pilot/r4c_kwave_hab_contract_seed2 \
  --profile Brain-AliasContract \
  --out-root runs/ablation/ka_v2_falsifiability \
  --stap-device cpu \
  --window-length 64 \
  --window-offsets 0 64 128 192 256 \
  --summary-csv reports/ka_v2_ablation.csv \
  --summary-json reports/ka_v2_ablation.json
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{Mace PD-only holdout alias-gate evaluation (label-free thresholds)}
    (paper refs: Table: Mace hold-out alias gate).
    Outputs: \path{reports/mace_alias_gate_holdout.csv}, \path{reports/mace_alias_gate_holdout.json}.
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/mace_alias_gate_holdout.py \
  --out-csv reports/mace_alias_gate_holdout.csv \
  --out-json reports/mace_alias_gate_holdout.json
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{Mace pixel-level vascular-atlas check (independent structural labels)}
    (paper refs: Macé section: vascular atlas pixel-level check).
    Outputs: \path{reports/mace_vascular_pixel_eval.csv}, \path{reports/mace_vascular_pixel_eval.json}.
    Notes: Maps atlas.Vascular into each scan plane using Transformation.mat; evaluates vascular vs non-vascular pixels (structural, not clinical efficacy).
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/mace_vascular_pixel_eval.py \
  --out-csv reports/mace_vascular_pixel_eval.csv \
  --out-json reports/mace_vascular_pixel_eval.json
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{Mace atlas-alignment sanity overlay figure}
    (paper refs: Appendix: Macé atlas alignment sanity check).
    Outputs: \path{figs/paper/mace_atlas_overlay.png}.
    Notes: Overlays atlas ROIs and atlas.Vascular contours on mean PD for representative planes (sanity check of Transformation.mat alignment).
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/mace_atlas_overlay_fig.py \
  --scan-name scan1 \
  --plane-indices 5 10 15 \
  --out-png figs/paper/mace_atlas_overlay.png
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{Mace PD-only contract v2 dashboard (plane sweep + paper figure)}
    (paper refs: Figure: mace\_pdonly\_contract\_v2\_dashboard.png).
    Outputs: \path{reports/mace_pdonly_contract_v2.csv}, \path{figs/paper/mace_pdonly_contract_v2_dashboard.png}.
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/mace_pdonly_contract_v2_sweep.py \
  --out-csv reports/mace_pdonly_contract_v2.csv

PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/mace_pdonly_contract_v2_dashboard_fig.py \
  --in-csv reports/mace_pdonly_contract_v2.csv \
  --out-png figs/paper/mace_pdonly_contract_v2_dashboard.png
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{Shin all-clips contract telemetry (n=80; telemetry-only)}
    (paper refs: Shin section: all-clips telemetry audit).
    Outputs: \path{reports/shin_ratbrain_shinU_e970_telemetry_only_0_128_all80.csv}, \path{reports/shin_ratbrain_shinU_e970_telemetry_only_0_128_all80_summary.json}.
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python -m scripts.shin_ratbrain_allclips_contract_hygiene \
  --extract-from-zip --no-run-stap --no-score-ka-v2 \
  --profile U --svd-energy-frac 0.97 --frames-list 0:128 \
  --out-root runs/shin_ratbrain_shinU_e970_telemetry_only_0_128_all80 \
  --out-csv reports/shin_ratbrain_shinU_e970_telemetry_only_0_128_all80.csv \
  --out-json reports/shin_ratbrain_shinU_e970_telemetry_only_0_128_all80_summary.json
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{Shin brainlike motion sweep (10 clips) + aggregate plots}
    (paper refs: Table: Shin motion endpoints, Figure: shin\_motion\_brainlike\_batch\_U\_agg.png, Figure: shin\_motion\_brainlike\_compare\_reg1.png, Figure: shin\_motion\_brainlike\_compare.png).
    Outputs: \path{reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U/*.csv}, \path{reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.csv}, \path{figs/paper/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.png}, \path{figs/paper/shin_motion_brainlike_compare_reg1.png}, \path{figs/paper/shin_motion_brainlike_compare.png}.
    Notes: Window-specific batch runs (64:192, 122:250) follow the same pattern; see scripts/shin\_ratbrain\_motion\_aggregate.py for expected inputs.
\begin{verbatim}
# Per-clip sweeps (canonical window 0:128; KA disabled):
for f in IQData001.dat IQData002.dat IQData003.dat IQData004.dat IQData005.dat IQData010.dat IQData020.dat IQData040.dat IQData060.dat IQData080.dat; do
  PYTHONPATH=. python -m scripts.shin_ratbrain_motion_sweep \
    --iq-file "$f" --frames 0:128 --profile U --svd-energy-frac 0.97 \
    --motion-kind brainlike --amp-px-list 0,0.5,1,2 \
    --no-score-ka-v2 --out-root runs/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U \
    --out-csv "reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U/${f%.dat}.csv" \
    --out-png "reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U/${f%.dat}.png";
done

# Aggregate curve (writes CSV + plot):
PYTHONPATH=. python -m scripts.shin_ratbrain_motion_aggregate \
  --in-dir reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U \
  --out-csv reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.csv \
  --out-png reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.png

# Compare across windows / reg ablations (writes comparison plots):
PYTHONPATH=. python -m scripts.shin_ratbrain_motion_compare \
  --curve "0:128=reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.csv" \
  --curve "64:192=reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_f64_192_reg1_agg.csv" \
  --curve "122:250=reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_f122_250_reg1_agg.csv" \
  --out-png reports/shin_motion_brainlike_compare_reg1.png
cp -f reports/shin_motion_brainlike_compare_reg1.png figs/paper/shin_motion_brainlike_compare_reg1.png
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{Shin motion crop/alignment sensitivity (post-hoc)}
    (paper refs: Shin motion section: crop sensitivity note).
    Outputs: \path{reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_crop_sensitivity.csv}.
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python -m scripts.shin_ratbrain_motion_sensitivity_posthoc \
  --run-root runs/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U \
  --amps 0,0.5,1,2 \
  --crop-margins 0,4,8,12 \
  --align-maps-list 0,1 \
  --out-csv reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_crop_sensitivity.csv
\end{verbatim}

  \item \textbf{Paper build modes (paper vs supplement vs full)}
    (paper refs: Build packaging (Phase 7)).
    Outputs: \path{stap_fus_paper.pdf}, \path{stap_fus_supplement.pdf}, \path{stap_fus_methodology.pdf}.
\begin{verbatim}
pdflatex stap_fus_methodology.tex   # full (default)
pdflatex stap_fus_paper.tex         # paper-only (no appendices)
pdflatex stap_fus_supplement.tex    # supplement-only (appendices only)
\end{verbatim}

\end{enumerate}
